items.a: Yes, consultations are free of charge. You are welcome to visit for a consultation only, even if you are still considering whether to proceed with treatment.
Yes, our clinic operates by appointment only. Please book in advance online, by phone, or by email.

items.q: Can I receive treatment on the same day as my consultation?
items.a: Yes, same-day treatment is possible. Treatment typically takes about 30 minutes, so please allow extra time if you are considering treatment on the same day. Please note that same-day treatment may not be available depending on your appointment time or clinic availability.
Consultations are conducted by doctors and nurses with extensive knowledge of regenerative medicine.

items.q: How long does a visit take?
items.a: The first visit, including consultation, usually takes within 60 minutes. Follow-up visits often take within 30 minutes.
Anesthesia is available as an optional add-on for injection treatments, tailored to your preference. There are no unexpected additional charges beyond the fees presented to you in advance.
Yes, our doctor is able to assist in Chinese. Chinese-speaking patients are welcome.

items.q: Are there cases where treatment is not possible?
items.a: Treatment is not available for those who are pregnant, may be pregnant, or are currently undergoing cancer treatment. Please confirm details during your consultation.
We are located at Ginza Seigetsudo Bldg. 5F, 5-9-15 Ginza, Chuo-ku, Tokyo. It is a 1-minute walk from Exit A3 of Ginza Station (Tokyo Metro), or a 3-minute walk from Higashi-Ginza Station.

items.q: What happens if I cancel without notice?
items.a: A cancellation fee of 3,000 yen will be charged for no-show cancellations. Please contact us in advance if you need to cancel or reschedule.

items.q: How do I make my next appointment?
items.a: You can book your next appointment online, by phone, or by email. You can also schedule your next visit at the clinic after your treatment.
